title: 日本ダービーの後に・焔、宿りて

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's strong in the lead! The Successor
lives up to the Beast's name!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder seizes a convincing victory over
her peers and now stands at the top.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: All while carrying the "Beast's Successor" mantle...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ugh, I lost... Grass sure is fast!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I've still got a ways to go... Better get back to
training!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Man, that last-second surge was nuts. Sure got
me good.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm honored.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...Grass.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh... El.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Nrgh... I hate this... I hate, hate, HATE THIS!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You pullin' ahead! Me failin' to catch up!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And that's not even the worst of it... I... I'm—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...Grass.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm runnin' in the Japan Cup next.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's the only G1 in Japan that gets so many
foreign racers—and I swore I'm gonna prove I'm
the world's strongest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So you better be there too!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: At the Japan Cup?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Sí! You have to!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You have to let me face you one more time!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
choice_data_list: Do you want to run in the Japan Cup?
Do you want to run in the Japan Cup?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I had never considered it, honestly.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
When thinking of gaining experience in the
Classics, the conventional course would lead me
to the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That or perhaps the Autumn Tenno Sho, taking
my strengths into consideration.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Really? From where I'm standing, you and El
facing off in the Japan Cup would be gnarly!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...! Maruzen.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heya! ♪ Nice race! ♪ That was some rad running
out there!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Like, I totes flipped out! Who'd have thunk you
cuties could compete with such fiery passion?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: So, you were watching, then.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Yep! 'Cause the thing is...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I've had my eye on that El Condor Pasa gal for a
little while now. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You don't say...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I mean, isn't she adorable? The way she puts
herself out there with her heart on her sleeve.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You know, I almost think...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
El might be more of a "Beast's Successor" than
you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, crap! I forgot I was in the middle of
something.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Bye, Grass! ♪ I'm looking forward to your next
race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Maruzensky leaves, Grass Wonder falls very
silent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later, on our way back...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I... was being irresolute earlier. I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But now, my heart is set.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer, please enter me in the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I am.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
How can I beat Maruzen if I'm not even fast
enough to be her Successor?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I have to prove my beastly strength once and for
all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she stands firm under the evening glow, Grass
Wonder's eyes are alight with steely
determination.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our goal is now set: to run in the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You just wait, Grass. This next one's gonna be
mine... I swear it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Next time, it'll be my silhouette you're chasin'!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: No matter who it is ya might be fixated on now!
